text: HARTING Product Change Notification NOR 0603/03 PCN Business Unit: Electric PCN/24/001/C+N Product range: Han / Han-Modular Date: 2024-02-22 Author: Heiko Meier Title: Han Megabit and Han Gigabit modules M2 Details of Product Changes 1. Concerned part number (see also attachment): 09140083011 09140083012 09140083111 09140083112 09140083016 09140083017 09140083116 09140083117 09140083021 09140083022 09140083121 09140083122 09140083031 09140083032 09140083131 09140083132 09140083034 09140083035 09140083134 09140083135 09140203013 09140203014 09140203113 09140203114 09140273013 09140273014 09140273113 09140273114 09142083011 09142083012 09142083111 09142083112 09142083016 09142083017 09142083116 09142083117 09142083021 09142083022 09142083121 09142083122 09142083031 09142083032 09142083131 09142083132 09142203013 09142203113 2. Description of changes / news: The cover fixation of the Han Megabit, Han Gigabit and Han Shielded modules is realized by two M2.5 screws with corresponding M2.5 thread in the housings. These screws will be changed to M2.5 self-tapping screws and a corresponding hole in the housings. It has no influence on technical features or installation process - Same type of delivery with pre-installed screws in the cover - Same installation procedure (same screw drivers and tightening torques) - Same technical features - After final installation the screws are secured in the same way by the module 3. Impact on product specification: No impact on the product specification 4. Scheduled date of implementation: Implementation starts from September 2024 HARTING Product Change Notification NOR 0603/03 PCN 5. Identification of change: All concerned part numbers get a new revision level 6. Data sheet (optional): Data sheets will not be changed
